entries.summary: Runtime verification: manual smoke test passed on all routes. No console errors or hydration mismatches. Regression sweep: 125/125 tests pass across 11 test files. Auth flow verified (GM login, player login, logout).
lessons_learned: Manual smoke test confirmed no runtime issues after the framework upgrade — the existing test coverage is sufficient for regression detection
125 existing tests across 11 files provide baseline confidence — no regressions from the two-version upgrade
